name: VIOLET ACADEMY
_layout: 10x8 enterable Academy core (docs/violet-academy.md) — the post-gym teaching hub. The ancient stone hall: the living answer to the Concord's 'skip the decade'. Ancient pillars (P, solid), the wall inscription (the thesis), the on-thesis INSTRUCTOR (3,3) + STUDENT (6,4) flavor (kept), and the THREE teaching functions as NPCs: STANCE MASTER (5,1 — the triangle + the hidden SPEED variable), MOVE SAGE (8,3 — the move-trial teaser, no mechanics until Phase 8), BOND KEEPER (1,3 — bond unlocks moves+Calls not stats, + evo readiness). Door (d) south back to Violet's square. Map FOOTPRINT is held this pass — the full grounds (training yard, bell room) is deferred to the art/enlargement pass (same ruling as Hearthwick).

objects._note: FUNCTION 1 — stance-triangle teaching (docs/violet-academy.md §1). Teaches A/G/F + trade-offs, the CURRENT engine triangle (A>F>G>A, Combat Layer 1 — supersedes the doc's older 'dodge if faster'), and surfaces SPEED as the hidden variable (the spec's #1 thing to teach). Explanation-only: the labelled in-battle COUNTER!/OPENING!/PUNISH! + FASTER/SLOWER callouts (combat-legibility sprint, shipped) ARE the live demonstration the spec asks for; a bespoke safe-practice battle mode is deferred (would need new battle wiring, not pure content).

objects._note: FUNCTION 2 — move-trial tutor TEASER (docs/violet-academy.md §2). Names the concept only; NO trial mechanics (those are Phase 8, build with bond). Pure dialog, zero script verbs — establishes the room's purpose without a Phase-8 dependency.

objects._note: FUNCTION 3 — bond / evo-readiness context (docs/violet-academy.md §3). Frames bond as horizontal (unlocks moves + Calls, NEVER stats) and delivers the canonical evo-readiness line (nearly ready — needs the next badge). The diegetic surface for the bond-gated / badge-capped evolution model.
